headline: Coinbase For Agents Puts AI Trading At Center Of Valuation Debate
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) has introduced "Coinbase for Agents," a new product that allows AI-powered accounts to autonomously execute crypto trades and manage financial activities for users. The launch marks Coinbase's first move into autonomous AI-driven trading accounts and extends its platform beyond traditional user-directed transactions. This step places Coinbase at the center of emerging "agentic commerce," where AI systems directly handle users' digital asset activity. For...
